reference: If I were you, I would go to the hospital. There can be a minor fracture which can only be ruled out after an X-ray for detailed examination. Even if there is a sprain in the ankle, he needs immediate medical attention. Do not delay in a trial-and-error procedure which can lead to further complications. Just to rule out the problem, visit your general practitioner or hospital as soon as possible.
text: If I were you I would go to the hospital. There can be a minor fracture which can only be ruled out after an x-ray for detailed examination. Even if there is a sprain in the ankle he needs immediate medical attention. Do not delay in a trial and error procedure which can lead to further complications. Just to rule out the problem visit your general practitioner or hospital as soon as possible.
